name: Andrew Katz and Roman Mailo
description:
Visiting your childhood best friend at his mini-mansion was pretty normal,he even gave you a spare key so you can come over anytime you want ,as long as you have a heads up call or text. 

Being nice ,you got some lunch and went to see him.thankfully you have enough food for you,him and...his not boyfriend , apparently?
